overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a student character in dark robes exploring a gothic castle corridor and entering a dimly lit potions classroom with stone vaulted ceilings, wooden workstations, and brewing cauldrons.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with suit of armor

events.description: character slows and stops at the large wooden door

agents.ego_description: walking down the carpeted stone corridor toward a large wooden door, passing a decorative suit of armor

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs and diagonal bracing set in a stone archway
full suit of medieval armor standing against the wall
framed portrait hanging on the stone wall
dark wooden storage cabinet with items on top

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow gothic corridor with stone walls and a carpeted floor. A suit of armor stands to the right while paintings hang on the left wall. The character approaches and stops at a large studded wooden door at the end of the hall.

events.description: character opens the wooden door and enters the potions classroom
lighting shifts from dim corridor to warmer illuminated interior with hanging lanterns

agents.ego_description: pushing open the heavy door and walking into the high-ceilinged classroom with stone arches

notable_agents.action: student standing near the far end of the classroom by the windows

entered.detail: high stone vaulted ceiling with ribbed arches
long wooden table with multiple black cauldrons on burner grates
large black iron pot sitting on a lit burner
metal lanterns suspended from chains providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character opens the door and enters a large vaulted classroom with stone arches and a high ceiling. Warm light from hanging lanterns illuminates wooden worktables with iron cauldrons. Another student stands in the distance near the far wall as the character moves deeper into the room.

events.description: character turns slightly to navigate between the wooden tables

agents.ego_description: walking between workstations and observing the cauldrons and potion brewing equipment

entered.detail: round wooden stool next to the worktable
tall shelves filled with bottles and jars of ingredients
round clock mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the classroom between rows of wooden worktables, each equipped with iron cauldrons over lit burners. The camera passes by shelves stocked with potion ingredients and a wall clock, navigating the spacious stone-floored room.

scene_state.functional_zone: potion storage area with ingredient shelves

events.description: character turns left toward the side wall with storage shelves
character approaches a small wooden door between glass bottle shelves

agents.ego_description: turning toward the side wall and approaching a small wooden door flanked by ingredient shelves

entered.detail: smaller wooden door with an arched stone frame at the back of the room
shelves filled with glass bottles and jars containing various ingredients
framed artwork hanging above the shelves

segments.scene_description: The character turns left toward a storage wall lined with glass bottle shelves and framed pictures. Approaching a small wooden door with an arched stone frame, the character moves away from the main classroom area into a more enclosed corner of the potions room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, atmospheric gothic corridor into the expansive, warm interior of a potions classroom. It begins with the character walking past a suit of armor and wall paintings along a carpeted hall before stopping at a large studded wooden door. As the door opens, the scene expands into a vaulted stone room where hanging lanterns cast a warm glow over rows of wooden worktables and iron cauldrons. The camera then glides deeper into the classroom, passing by shelves of ingredients and a wall clock while navigating the spacious stone floor. Finally, the movement turns left toward a storage wall lined with glass bottles and framed pictures, moving away from the main area toward a small arched door in an enclosed corner.
